data.current_summary: AI video generation from text prompts via Runway Gen-3
data.current_description: AI video generation from text prompts via Runway Gen-3

Processing may take time; check status via returned job ID if asynchronous.

data.current_summary: Find email address for a person at a company via Hunter.io
data.current_description: Find email address for a person at a company via Hunter.io
data.description_suggestion: Searches for an email address for a specific person at a given company using Hunter.io database. Requires person's name and company name as inputs. Returns the discovered email address with confidence score, or null if not found. May also return related email patterns and additional contact information if available.

data.current_summary: Neural/semantic web search via Exa AI
